---
title: "Education & Capacity Building"
description: "Workforce development through training, mentorship, and practical implementation support for public health professionals."
---

# Education & Capacity Building

EpiPulse develops public health workforce capacity through rigorous training, mentorship, and hands-on implementation support.

## Training Programs

### Public Health Fundamentals
- Epidemiology essentials
- Biostatistics and data analysis
- Public health program planning
- Ethics in public health research
- Health policy and systems

### Research & Methods
- Study design and implementation
- Qualitative and quantitative research methods
- Implementation science approaches
- Data analysis using R
- Health systems research

### Field Implementation Skills
- Community health worker training
- Care provider competency development
- Supervision and monitoring
- Quality improvement methods
- Documentation and reporting

### Health Data & Digital Skills
- Health information systems
- Data visualization and dashboards
- R programming for health
- Digital health technologies
- Data security and privacy

## Fellowship & Mentorship

### EpiPulse Fellowship Programs
- Short-term placements (1-3 months)
- Specialized field projects
- Mentored research experience
- Practical problem-solving exposure
- Networking with public health professionals

### Areas of Focus
- Epidemiology and surveillance
- NCD prevention and control
- Maternal and child health
- Environmental and occupational health
- Health systems strengthening

### Mentorship Support
- Individual career guidance
- Research project mentoring
- Implementation support
- Publication and dissemination help

## Capacity Building Services

### For Organizations
- Customized training programs
- Staff competency assessment
- Organizational development
- Systems strengthening
- Performance improvement support

### For Academic Institutions
- Curriculum development
- Faculty mentoring
- Student project support
- Research collaboration

### For Health Systems
- Health worker training
- Quality improvement coaching
- Supervision strengthening
- Data system implementation

## Learning Resources

### Online Learning Platform
- Video tutorials
- Case studies
- Implementation guides
- Research methodology resources
- Public health data analysis examples

### Publications & Tools
- Practical implementation guides
- Training manuals
- Monitoring and evaluation frameworks
- Quality improvement toolkits

## Target Participants

- Public health professionals
- Health system managers
- Community health workers
- Health facility staff
- Academic researchers
- Data analysts
- Program implementers

## Application & Enrollment

Interested in our training or fellowship programs?

**Email**: education@epipulse.org  
**Learn More**: [Contact Us](contact.qmd)

---

*Building a skilled, ethical, and evidence-informed public health workforce for healthier communities.*
